headline: ML Engineer | Python | 4 Years Experience

experience_text:

ai_generated_summary: Rahul Sharma is an experienced ML Engineer with 4 years of experience in building NLP and deep learning models. He has worked at TCS and Infosys, where he has built text classification models using BERT and PyTorch and deployed them on AWS SageMaker. He is proficient in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, NLP, BERT, AWS, SQL, scikit-learn, Docker, and has certifications in AWS Cloud Practitioner.
